primary.name: Museo Sans
primary.usage: All brand communication — advertising, brochures, printed and digital marketing material.
primary.source: Commercial. Available via Adobe Fonts or MyFonts. See fonts.md.

webFallback.name: Century Gothic
webFallback.usage: Fallback when Museo Sans is unavailable or fails to load. Widely system-installed.
webFallback.source: Widely licensed; typically system-available. See fonts.md.

accent.name: Feeling Passionate
accent.usage: Use sparingly, to add a touch of character. Never for body text or headings.
accent.source: To be confirmed. See OPEN-QUESTIONS.md item 3.

scaleExample.note: Reference print scale from the brand guide. Maintain the relative hierarchy when scaling for digital.

rules: Body text is always Ocean (#001f49), never plain black.
Maintain the hierarchy ratio when scaling to digital sizes.
